title: GPT-5.5 Pro Repass Rankings
scoring_note: Clean-risk score v4b: raw MOIC is capped; cash-flowing/profitable operating inflections get a clean-operating floor, stale/delisted/insolvent names are forced down, and active industrial rows are separated from delisted cleanup. Bonuses go to cash/asset backing, earnings, FCF, dividends/buybacks, low leverage and runway; penalties hit dilution, debt/refinancing, going-concern/audit/delisting, financing-sensitive project risk, binary exploration/clinical risk, governance, illiquidity and deteriorating financials.
